reference: I have been diagnosed with lupus and collagenous colitis. For the past seven months, my legs have been swelling, sometimes with a burning sensation. I was wondering if I have nephritis? My cousin died from nephritis about fifty years ago when she was only seventeen.
text: I have been diagnosed with lupus and collagenous colitis for the past seven months. My legs have been swelling, sometimes with a burning sensation. I was wondering if I have nephritis. My cousin died from nephritis about fifty years ago when she was seventeen.
